outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/t5_3_tlf_responder_debug_006.R
+++ b/programs/t5_3_tlf_responder_debug_006.R
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 adadas <- adadas %>%
   filter(EFFFL == "Y",
          PARAMCD == "ACTOT",
-         AVISITN == 24,
+         AVISITN %in% c(0, 24),
          ANL01FL == "Y")
 
 # Calculate responder status
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
 resp_data <- adadas %>%
   arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN) %>%
   group_by(USUBJID) %>%
-  mutate(RESPONDER = if_else(CHG <= -4, "Responder", "Non-Responder")) %>%
+  mutate(RESPONDER = if_else(CHG >= -4, "Responder", "Non-Responder")) %>%
   filter(AVISITN == 24) %>%
   ungroup()
 
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
 resp_summary <- resp_data %>%
   group_by(TRTAN, TRTA) %>%
   summarise(
-    n_resp = sum(RESPONDER == "Responder"),
+    n_resp = sum(RESPONDER == "Responder", na.rm = TRUE),
     n_total = n(),
     pct_resp = 100 * n_resp / n_total,
     .groups = "drop"
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@
   trt_54 <- filter(resp_data, TRTAN == 54)$RESPONDER == "Responder"
   trt_81 <- filter(resp_data, TRTAN == 81)$RESPONDER == "Responder"
   
-  p_val_54 <- fisher.test(table(trt_0, trt_54))$p.value
-  p_val_81 <- fisher.test(table(trt_0, trt_81))$p.value
+  p_val_54 <- chisq.test(table(trt_0, trt_54))$p.value
+  p_val_81 <- chisq.test(table(trt_0, trt_81))$p.value
   
   return(list(p_54 = p_val_54, p_81 = p_val_81))
